goals.description: Finish the reading response draft by midnight tonight, prioritizing speed over polish to secure a win before anyone else can claim the spotlight.
goals.rationale: My achievement drive is screaming for a tangible win here. The deadline is soft, but missing it feels like a personal failure I can't afford. I'm cutting corners on quality because time is my only non-negotiable resource right now. If I waste another minute arguing about the smell or feeling guilty, I'm letting someone else steal my academic victory. Just write, just finish, just claim the win.

goals.description: Leave this smelly room immediately and collapse on the couch to recover from zero energy; staying here is draining me and making me look irresponsible to everyone else.
goals.rationale: The smell is a distraction that undermines my focus, but dealing with it now means losing momentum on the task. I'll handle the room cleanup tomorrow when the dust settles and the grade is secure. For now, I need to shut down the brain and get rest so I can power through tomorrow's workload without showing weakness. Getting out of this room is low priority compared to finishing the assignment.

goals.description: Relocate to the library immediately to escape the smelly room and secure deep-focus time for the reading response.
goals.rationale: The odor is actively degrading my cognitive performance (focus_capacity: 6 -> dropping), which directly threatens my primary value: academic success. I need to remove the environmental friction before I waste more energy fighting distractions.

goals.description: Complete the first draft of the reading response in the new location within 90 minutes.
goals.rationale: This is non-negotiable. Missing the Wednesday deadline risks a low grade, which violates my achievement orientation. The short planning horizon means I'm discounting future stress about explaining my sleep schedule; that's a problem for tomorrow, not today.

goals.description: Inform roommate_R via text that I've left early due to health/focus reasons so they don't wait up.
goals.rationale: Relationship maintenance is a lower priority than the assignment right now. Since they are out until ~7 and generally friendly, a direct explanation isn't urgent. I'll handle this later if needed to avoid unnecessary social friction.
